reviews.comment:
ESTUVIMOS DE PASADA,DESAYUNAMOS Y NOS DIERON TODOS LOS CONSEJOS PARA CRUZAR A CHILE,MUCHA NEVADA ASÍ QUE SEGUIMOS LOS CONSEJOS Y NOS QUEDAMOS DEL LADO ARGENTINO.
MUY AMABLES Y SERVICIALES.

(Translated by Google)
We were passing through, had breakfast, and they gave us all the tips for crossing into Chile. It was snowing heavily, so we followed their advice and stayed on the Argentine side.
Very friendly and helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRNlpLMWR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Lugar tranquilo y muy bien atendido. Precios bajos. Parada obligada antes de cruzar a Chile, última estación de combustible. Cierran a medianoche.

(Translated by Google)
Quiet place with excellent service. Low prices. A must-stop before crossing into Chile, the last gas station. They close at midnight.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3OXJqQXRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
En este lugar se puede cargar combustible y disponer de los servicios de cafetería, comidas, bebidas y hasta un asador y baños buenos antes de pasar a la Aduana de Paso de Agua Negra que se encuentra a 2 kms de allí y de donde habilitan el paso a las 07,00 ha aproximadamente hacía Chile, puesto que desde allí no hay ningún servicio hasta llegar a la República de Chile.

(Translated by Google)
At this location you can refuel and enjoy cafeteria services, meals, drinks, and even a grill and good restrooms before proceeding to the Paso de Agua Negra Customs, which is located 2 km away. From there, the crossing to Chile is opened at approximately 7:00 am, as there are no services beyond this point until reaching the Republic of Chile.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnNk9YYU5BEAE
